entries.statement: Report to the board, audit committee, and executive leadership on data and AI risk posture, program maturity, regulatory compliance status, and value realization.
Design and lead enterprise data and AI transformation programs, including operating model redesign, capability development roadmaps, and organizational change management.
Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, including vision articulation, strategic priority identification, capability roadmap construction, and annual strategy refresh.
Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.

Manage the data and AI investment portfolio, including initiative prioritization, funding allocation, performance tracking against value hypotheses, and portfolio rebalancing based on realized outcomes.

Conduct data and AI due diligence assessments for M&A and investment transactions, including data asset evaluation, technical architecture review, key person risk assessment, and integration planning.
Establish and operate data and AI governance committees, including charter development, membership selection, decision authority definition, and meeting cadence and agenda management.
Build organizational data culture through executive sponsorship, success story amplification, recognition programs, and visible leadership commitment to data-informed decision-making.

Staff data and AI organizational units by defining role requirements, evaluating candidate qualifications against defined competency frameworks, conducting structured hiring processes, and designing team compositions that balance technical depth with cross-functional capability.
entries.strm_gap_source: STRM-001-ONET: O*NET 4.A.4.c.2 (Staffing Organizational Units) — STS 0.425 to LS-K-009
